response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine depth in distributed systems and full-stack engineering across a very long career, including high-throughput work at Sociomantic and recent AI-agent tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is specifically Principal-level with a mandate to architect and own experimentation platforms — A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, feature flagging, rollout automation, statistical guardrails — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. Python (a listed requirement) is absent from his skills. His experience tops out at Staff-level IC scope with no evidence of cross-team experimentation-platform ownership or data-science partnership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Broad polyglot background across TypeScript/Node, C/C++, C#, D, Java — covers several of the role's required languages
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq shows engagement with modern developer tooling in an IC-led capacity
concerns: Zero explicit experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, experiment assignment, or rollout automation mentioned anywhere
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure ownership; the role's core deliverables (instrumentation foundations, guardrails, statistical analysis workflows) have no analogue in the resume
Python is absent from the skills section and career narrative despite being a listed required language and standard tool for data/experimentation work

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and data aptitude evidence
